best_practice: {"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Programmatic Display, Programmatic Video, Programmatic BVOD, Programmatic Audio.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Display", "items": ["Scaled, automated, data-driven display bought from one DSP across many publishers, with the key advantage of cross-publisher frequency deduplication and centralised optimisation.", "Split prospecting and retargeting into separate line items, weight the PMP-vs-open-exchange mix to brand-safety needs, and apply supply-path optimisation to cut hidden reseller fees.", "Use pre-bid viewability and brand-safety segments, target viewability above 70% verified by DV/IAS (not DSP-reported), and validate incrementality rather than crediting every view-through."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Video", "items": ["Scaled, automated video across web, in-app and CTV with centralised audience targeting and cross-publisher frequency control; deploy for awareness/consideration where viewable completed views are the goal.", "Match format to goal (6s bumpers, skippable, 15s non-skippable), front-load brand in the first 5 seconds, and supply vertical/square cuts with correct VAST specs per exchange.", "Buy skippable on CPV/CPCV and bumpers on CPM, optimise to viewable completion rather than cheap CPM, and watch for auto-play/muted or fraudulent completions inflating VCR on cheap supply."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic BVOD", "items": ["Buys premium AU BVOD inventory (7plus, 9Now, 10 Play, SBS On Demand) programmatically via PMP/PG, adding DSP-level audience and frequency management to full-screen non-skippable TV-quality reach.", "Access broadcaster first-party data through PMP deals for demo/geo/genre targeting, supply broadcast-grade 15s/30s masters, and prioritise big-screen/CTV for impact and co-viewing.", "Traded on CPCV; enforce a single plan-level cross-broadcaster frequency cap in the DSP - over-delivery is the biggest risk when broadcasters cap in isolation."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Audio", "items": ["Digital audio bought at scale programmatically across streaming, radio streaming and podcast SSPs from one DSP, with centralised frequency management; still an upper-funnel channel.", "Target by demo/genre/mood/daypart and first-party segments, attach companion banners with a verbal CTA, and separate scalable dynamically-inserted streaming spots from premium host-reads (direct/PMP).", "Streaming/podcasts typically trade on CPM while some partners (Spotify) bill CPCL - normalise before comparing; triangulate the immature AU audio measurement with pixels, promo codes and lift studies."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["DV360 is Google's demand-side platform (a buying tool / seat), not a media owner - the 'publisher' here is the DSP through which Assembled activates programmatic display, video, BVOD and audio.", "Its strength is one-DSP cross-exchange frequency deduplication and access to YouTube/Google inventory alongside third-party supply; lean on PMP/PG deals for premium AU BVOD and video.", "Use DV360's own brand-safety and pre-bid controls plus an independent verification layer (DV/IAS), and apply supply-path optimisation to strip reseller fees."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Search.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Search", "items": ["Harvests existing high-intent demand rather than creating awareness; always run a brand campaign to defend the SERP, and keep brand and non-brand in separate campaigns so blended CPA/ROAS never flatters non-brand.", "Use Responsive Search Ads (12-15 headlines, 4 descriptions, minimal pinning) with all extensions populated, and maintain a rigorous negative-keyword list reviewed weekly.", "Match bid strategy to goal (tCPA lead-gen, tROAS ecommerce), give Smart Bidding ~30+ conversions/30 days before tightening targets, and judge on CPA/conversions or ROAS/revenue - CTR and CPC are diagnostics only."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Assembled's Google Ads search seat; treat Performance Max with caution and always add brand as an account-level negative so PMax cannot cannibalise and over-credit brand search.", "Prefer YouTube Select and Demand Gen for controlled reach when extending beyond search, and keep discrete brand vs non-brand campaigns for honest efficiency reads.", "Use data-driven attribution and enhanced conversions where volume allows so upper-funnel generic terms get fair credit."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Social Media.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Social Media", "items": ["Works across the funnel but pick platforms by where the audience genuinely is; lead with broad targeting plus strong creative and let the algorithm find buyers rather than over-narrowing interests.", "Design creative per placement (9:16 vertical for Reels/Stories/TikTok, 1:1 or 4:5 in-feed), built for sound-off with captions and a hook in the first 1-2 seconds; ship multiple variants per ad set.", "Implement CAPI (server-side) to recover post-iOS signal, consolidate ad sets to exit learning (~50 events/ad set/week), and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM and incrementality."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Assembled's Meta (Facebook/Instagram) biddable seat; default to Advantage+ Shopping/Sales and Advantage+ Audience for consolidated, automation-led performance.", "Implement the Conversions API (CAPI) server-side to recover post-iOS signal loss and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM.", "Prioritise Reels and vertical 9:16 creative built sound-off with captions, and consolidate ad sets to exit the learning phase faster (~50 events/ad set/week)."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Search.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Search", "items": ["Harvests existing high-intent demand rather than creating awareness; always run a brand campaign to defend the SERP, and keep brand and non-brand in separate campaigns so blended CPA/ROAS never flatters non-brand.", "Use Responsive Search Ads (12-15 headlines, 4 descriptions, minimal pinning) with all extensions populated, and maintain a rigorous negative-keyword list reviewed weekly.", "Match bid strategy to goal (tCPA lead-gen, tROAS ecommerce), give Smart Bidding ~30+ conversions/30 days before tightening targets, and judge on CPA/conversions or ROAS/revenue - CTR and CPC are diagnostics only."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Assembled's Microsoft Advertising (Bing/Edge) search seat; import structure from Google then re-optimise rather than running a raw copy, to pick up incremental lower-competition inventory.", "Typically cheaper CPCs and an older/desktop-skewed AU audience than Google - a useful efficiency and reach extension, not a standalone plan.", "Keep brand and non-brand separate and mirror the negative-keyword discipline used on Google."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Social Media, Influencers.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Social Media", "items": ["Works across the funnel but pick platforms by where the audience genuinely is; lead with broad targeting plus strong creative and let the algorithm find buyers rather than over-narrowing interests.", "Design creative per placement (9:16 vertical for Reels/Stories/TikTok, 1:1 or 4:5 in-feed), built for sound-off with captions and a hook in the first 1-2 seconds; ship multiple variants per ad set.", "Implement CAPI (server-side) to recover post-iOS signal, consolidate ad sets to exit learning (~50 events/ad set/week), and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM and incrementality."]}, {"heading": "Influencers", "items": ["AU is a premium influencer market - creator rates typically run ~10-20% above equivalent US rates, so brief and budget accordingly and confirm deliverables and usage terms up front.", "Brief on engagement rate by tier (a healthy guide is ~3-7%), mandate clear #ad/disclosure to meet ACMA and AANA rules, and secure whitelisting/creator licensing rights where the content will be used for paid amplification."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["TikTok's biddable seat plus influencer capability; prioritise Spark Ads (boosting organic/creator posts) which consistently outperform standalone in-feed ads.", "Brief native, sound-on, creator-led vertical creative - TVC cut-downs underperform - and use the TikTok Creator Marketplace for compliant, whitelisted creator partnerships.", "Reach younger AU audiences here; pair with CAPI-equivalent events and treat in-platform attribution as directional."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Search, Social Media.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Search", "items": ["Harvests existing high-intent demand rather than creating awareness; always run a brand campaign to defend the SERP, and keep brand and non-brand in separate campaigns so blended CPA/ROAS never flatters non-brand.", "Use Responsive Search Ads (12-15 headlines, 4 descriptions, minimal pinning) with all extensions populated, and maintain a rigorous negative-keyword list reviewed weekly.", "Match bid strategy to goal (tCPA lead-gen, tROAS ecommerce), give Smart Bidding ~30+ conversions/30 days before tightening targets, and judge on CPA/conversions or ROAS/revenue - CTR and CPC are diagnostics only."]}, {"heading": "Social Media", "items": ["Works across the funnel but pick platforms by where the audience genuinely is; lead with broad targeting plus strong creative and let the algorithm find buyers rather than over-narrowing interests.", "Design creative per placement (9:16 vertical for Reels/Stories/TikTok, 1:1 or 4:5 in-feed), built for sound-off with captions and a hook in the first 1-2 seconds; ship multiple variants per ad set.", "Implement CAPI (server-side) to recover post-iOS signal, consolidate ad sets to exit learning (~50 events/ad set/week), and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM and incrementality."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Emerging AI-assistant search/social seat; treat as experimental incremental reach with limited standardised measurement, not a core performance channel.", "Set clear test-and-learn objectives and conservative budgets, and reconcile any response back to owned analytics since native reporting is immature."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: direct publisher (direct).", "Digital channels enabled: Digital Display, Digital Audio, BVOD (Broadcaster Video On Demand).", "Offline channels enabled (planned outside this digital best-practice, listed for reference): Television, Radio.", "Direct publisher - Assembled typically buys via insertion order, PMP or programmatic guaranteed deals negotiated with the publisher/sales house."]}, {"heading": "Digital Display", "items": ["Cost-efficient reach, always-on presence and retargeting; strong for warm site/CRM audiences but a low-CTR, largely view-through channel for prospecting.", "Traffic the full IAB suite (300x250, 728x90, 300x600, 320x50, 320x100) with responsive HTML5 plus static fallbacks; split prospecting and retargeting into separate line items with their own creative, caps and measurement.", "Lean on contextual, first-party and PMP audiences as third-party cookies deprecate, target viewability above 70% verified independently (DV/IAS), and cap frequency (~3/day) to control cost."]}, {"heading": "Digital Audio", "items": ["Upper-funnel reach and frequency channel for screen-free moments across streaming music, radio streaming and podcasts; not a direct-response workhorse on its own.", "Write audio-first 15s/30s spots with an early brand mention and single spoken CTA, always attach a clickable companion banner, and use a consistent sonic/audio logo for recall.", "Note billing differs by partner (Spotify bills CPCL/completed listens vs CPM elsewhere) so normalise before comparing; cap frequency across the buy and triangulate measurement with pixels, promo codes and lift studies."]}, {"heading": "BVOD (Broadcaster Video On Demand)", "items": ["Premium, brand-safe, full-screen non-skippable TV-quality reach in a lean-back environment (AU players: 7plus, 9Now, 10 Play, SBS On Demand); an upper-funnel channel, not click-driven.", "Use broadcaster first-party login data for demo/geo/genre targeting, supply broadcast-grade 15s/30s masters, and prioritise big-screen/CTV delivery where co-viewing and impact are highest.", "Traded on CPCV (guaranteed completed views); the biggest risk is over-delivery, so enforce cross-device, cross-broadcaster frequency capping at plan level rather than trusting each publisher's siloed cap."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["SBS trades direct across TV, radio, digital display, digital audio and SBS On Demand (BVOD); its distinction is genuine multicultural and in-language reach across 60+ communities.", "Use SBS's in-language and multicultural audience segments for CALD (culturally and linguistically diverse) targeting that mainstream broadcasters cannot match.", "No gambling/wagering advertising is accepted, and as a public broadcaster it enforces stricter content and category standards - clear creative early.", "SBS On Demand offers premium, brand-safe, non-skippable BVOD, strong for reaching lighter commercial-TV viewers."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: direct publisher (direct).", "No digital channels enabled for this record.", "Offline channels enabled (planned outside this digital best-practice, listed for reference): Out-of-Home (OOH).", "Direct publisher - Assembled typically buys via insertion order, PMP or programmatic guaranteed deals negotiated with the publisher/sales house."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["oOh!media is Australia's largest OOH operator, spanning roadside, retail, street furniture, transit, airports and office/fly networks.", "Plan and value on MOVE 2.0 impressions (Visibility Adjusted Contacts), not screen plays; its digital screens support programmatic DOOH with dayparting and dynamic creative.", "Retail/Reach networks put screens close to point-of-purchase - strong for shopper and FMCG activation; build glance-media creative to native specs."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Social Media.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Social Media", "items": ["Works across the funnel but pick platforms by where the audience genuinely is; lead with broad targeting plus strong creative and let the algorithm find buyers rather than over-narrowing interests.", "Design creative per placement (9:16 vertical for Reels/Stories/TikTok, 1:1 or 4:5 in-feed), built for sound-off with captions and a hook in the first 1-2 seconds; ship multiple variants per ad set.", "Implement CAPI (server-side) to recover post-iOS signal, consolidate ad sets to exit learning (~50 events/ad set/week), and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM and incrementality."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Pinterest is a discovery/high-intent visual-search platform; strong for retail, home, fashion, food and DIY where users actively plan purchases.", "Lower-funnel intent skews higher than typical social; use keyword and interest targeting plus shopping/product feeds.", "Ship vertical, clean, aspirational creative built for a browse-and-save mindset."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Programmatic Display, Programmatic Video.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Display", "items": ["Scaled, automated, data-driven display bought from one DSP across many publishers, with the key advantage of cross-publisher frequency deduplication and centralised optimisation.", "Split prospecting and retargeting into separate line items, weight the PMP-vs-open-exchange mix to brand-safety needs, and apply supply-path optimisation to cut hidden reseller fees.", "Use pre-bid viewability and brand-safety segments, target viewability above 70% verified by DV/IAS (not DSP-reported), and validate incrementality rather than crediting every view-through."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Video", "items": ["Scaled, automated video across web, in-app and CTV with centralised audience targeting and cross-publisher frequency control; deploy for awareness/consideration where viewable completed views are the goal.", "Match format to goal (6s bumpers, skippable, 15s non-skippable), front-load brand in the first 5 seconds, and supply vertical/square cuts with correct VAST specs per exchange.", "Buy skippable on CPV/CPCV and bumpers on CPM, optimise to viewable completion rather than cheap CPM, and watch for auto-play/muted or fraudulent completions inflating VCR on cheap supply."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Programmatic Video, Programmatic BVOD.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Video", "items": ["Scaled, automated video across web, in-app and CTV with centralised audience targeting and cross-publisher frequency control; deploy for awareness/consideration where viewable completed views are the goal.", "Match format to goal (6s bumpers, skippable, 15s non-skippable), front-load brand in the first 5 seconds, and supply vertical/square cuts with correct VAST specs per exchange.", "Buy skippable on CPV/CPCV and bumpers on CPM, optimise to viewable completion rather than cheap CPM, and watch for auto-play/muted or fraudulent completions inflating VCR on cheap supply."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic BVOD", "items": ["Buys premium AU BVOD inventory (7plus, 9Now, 10 Play, SBS On Demand) programmatically via PMP/PG, adding DSP-level audience and frequency management to full-screen non-skippable TV-quality reach.", "Access broadcaster first-party data through PMP deals for demo/geo/genre targeting, supply broadcast-grade 15s/30s masters, and prioritise big-screen/CTV for impact and co-viewing.", "Traded on CPCV; enforce a single plan-level cross-broadcaster frequency cap in the DSP - over-delivery is the biggest risk when broadcasters cap in isolation."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: direct publisher (direct).", "No digital channels enabled for this record.", "Offline channels enabled (planned outside this digital best-practice, listed for reference): Out-of-Home (OOH).", "Direct publisher - Assembled typically buys via insertion order, PMP or programmatic guaranteed deals negotiated with the publisher/sales house."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Vicinity Centres operates DOOH across its shopping-centre portfolio; its value is proximity to point-of-purchase and shopper catchment audiences.", "Strongest for retail, FMCG and shopper-marketing activation close to the moment of purchase; plan on MOVE 2.0 impressions.", "Build glance-media creative to native centre-screen specs for a high-attention shopper environment."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Programmatic Video.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Programmatic Video", "items": ["Scaled, automated video across web, in-app and CTV with centralised audience targeting and cross-publisher frequency control; deploy for awareness/consideration where viewable completed views are the goal.", "Match format to goal (6s bumpers, skippable, 15s non-skippable), front-load brand in the first 5 seconds, and supply vertical/square cuts with correct VAST specs per exchange.", "Buy skippable on CPV/CPCV and bumpers on CPM, optimise to viewable completion rather than cheap CPM, and watch for auto-play/muted or fraudulent completions inflating VCR on cheap supply."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Twitch is Amazon's live-streaming/gaming platform; its value is a highly engaged, younger, hard-to-reach gaming audience via video inventory.", "Native, non-interruptive and creator-led formats work best; standard TVC cut-downs feel out of place in live-stream context.", "Treat as reach extension into gaming audiences, activated programmatically as video."]}]}

{"version": 1, "sections": [{"heading": "Publisher overview", "items": ["Publisher type: internal biddable seat (internal_biddable).", "Digital channels enabled: Social Media.", "Internal biddable seat - Assembled activates this in-house through a self-serve/DSP or auction-based platform rather than an insertion order."]}, {"heading": "Social Media", "items": ["Works across the funnel but pick platforms by where the audience genuinely is; lead with broad targeting plus strong creative and let the algorithm find buyers rather than over-narrowing interests.", "Design creative per placement (9:16 vertical for Reels/Stories/TikTok, 1:1 or 4:5 in-feed), built for sound-off with captions and a hook in the first 1-2 seconds; ship multiple variants per ad set.", "Implement CAPI (server-side) to recover post-iOS signal, consolidate ad sets to exit learning (~50 events/ad set/week), and reconcile in-platform ROAS against GA4/CRM and incrementality."]}, {"heading": "Publisher-specific notes", "items": ["Reddit is an interest-community social platform; its value is precise targeting against subreddit communities and genuine-interest audiences.", "Native, conversational, community-respecting creative outperforms polished ads - match the tone of the community.", "Strong for enthusiast, tech and niche-interest targeting; treat in-platform attribution as directional."]}]}
